meta.load_condition: Load when user asks why prompt optimization approaches often fail.

reasoning_chains.one_sentence: Adding format constraints to a task-mixed prompt is like putting a better frame on a broken lens — it looks better but still does not focus.
logic: When a prompt mixes generation, evaluation, and decision, the model faces conflicting optimization targets.
Format instructions tell the model how to structure output, not what to prioritize.
The model will produce well-formatted output that is generically correct — satisfying the format constraint while avoiding commitment on any specific cognitive task.
The user sees good formatting and assumes the prompt is working, missing that the substance is hollow.
reasoning_chains.so_what: Always check for task mixing before suggesting format improvements. A well-formatted wrong answer is worse than an obviously bad one.
